title.en: The depths of the Black Meteor Sea.

content.en:
Bang!!!

The White Immortal Controller and the Black Ancestor moved at the same time, and the entire Black Meteor Sea trembled.

The depths of the Black Meteor Sea.

Black Ancestor burst out with all his strength, coupled with the assistance of the White Immortal Controller, so that the magic circle was in the weakest state, after all, if you attack from the outside, although this magic circle can block the attack of the Ten Realms level controller, most of the strength is used to resist the attack from the outside, and the inside will be very weak.

This is Heizu's chance!

Click!

The black threads shattered, but this time only a tenth of the black threads were shattered.

"Bai Ming, keep attacking!"

Heizu said.

"Good!"

The White Immortal Controller also knew that he would not be able to break through the magic circle with one blow and help the Black Ancestor get out of trouble, at least he needed to attack again and again.

Soon, another attack began.

Bang!

This attack made Hei Zu break free of one-tenth of the black silk thread.

In this way, the White Immortal Controller and the Black Ancestor continued to cooperate, and the black magic array silk threads on the Black Ancestor that locked him became less and less.

......

Primordial Realm.

This is the place of the primordial controller, and the primordial controller is the son of the primordial ancestor, and he is also the eldest disciple, and his cultivation is very strong, he has reached the level of the Ten Realms controller, and his strength is even stronger than that of the ancient demon controller, second only to the black decay controller.

At this time.

The Primordial Master opened his eyes and looked at the Black Meteor Sea.

"There seems to be movement in the Black Meteor Sea!"

The face of the original controller changed.

When his father was still in the Origin Realm Sea, he didn't need to worry about the Black Ancestor of the Black Meteor Sea, even if the other party was out of trouble, his father could continue to seal it.

But now, my father can no longer enter the Origin Realm Sea, and once Hei Zu is freed, there is really no way to help him.

Swish!

The Primordial Masters quickly shuttled to the Black Meteor Sea.

The speed of the Ten Realm-level controllers was so fast, so in the blink of an eye, they came to the Black Meteor Sea.

At this time, he saw the White Immortal Controller and an incarnation of the Black Ancestor.

"White Immortal Master, you want to help Black Ancestor get out of trouble?"

The Primordial Ruler was furious.

Originally, he thought that Heizu couldn't get out of trouble, after all, this was a magic circle arranged by his father, how could Heizu get out of trouble?

Unexpectedly, there were other Ten Realm-level controllers who helped Hei Zu get out of trouble.

"Give me death!"

The Primordial Controller struck, shattering the Endless Space-Time with a single blow and hitting the White Immortal Controller.

The White Immortal Controller was shocked, he was not the opponent of the original Controller!

"Continue to attack the formation, the original controller will not be able to kill you in a few moves. Heizu said: "Help me get out of trouble now, and you will be safe!"

The White Immortal Controller felt that what the Black Ancestor said made sense, so he ignored the attack of the Primordial Controller, and only performed a top-notch Origin Control Technique of the defensive type, and forcibly suffered a blow from the Primordial Controller.

At the same time, he cooperated with Heizu and launched another attack.

"Damn, the White Immortal Controller has to help Black Ancestor get out of trouble!" "The Primordial Controller knew that it was useless for him to attack the White Immortal Controller like this, and he couldn't be killed in a short period of time.

Therefore, it is necessary to divide the White Immortal Master from the Black Meteor Sea.

In this way, the White Immortal Controller would not want to continue attacking the magic circle.

"Space-Time Boundary Sea!"

The Primordial Controller launched this move and swept directly towards the White Immortal Controller.

In an instant, the White Immortal Controller found that he had been swept into another time and space by the Primordial Controller, and escaped from the Black Meteor Sea.

"Oh no!"

The White Immortal Master's face changed.

The next moment, the figure of the original controller appeared.

"White Immortal Master, you really want to die!"

The Primordial Controller said coldly.

Rumble!

The big battle broke out, and the White Immortal Controller was not the opponent of the original controller at all, and was completely crushed by him.

......

The depths of the Black Meteor Sea.

Hei Zu knew that he couldn't count on the White Immortal Controller, but fortunately, most of the seal had been broken, and he could still break the seal and get out of trouble by relying on his own strength.

Click!

A black thread broke with all his might.

Time passed slowly, and Heizu continued to break free from the seal.

Finally, all the black magic circle threads were freed by him.

"Hahaha, my Black Ancestor is finally going to be free!"

Heizu said excitedly.

Instantly, he punched the circle.

Rumble!

The Black Meteor Sea was directly pierced by Black Ancestor's punch.

The next moment, the Black Ancestor walked out from the depths of the Black Meteor Sea.

In an instant, the Black Ancestor directly broke through the space-time boundary sea of the original controller, and dragged out the white master who was about to be killed.

"Heizu, you're out of trouble!"

The White Immortal Ruler was overjoyed.

"Yes, I'm out of trouble!" said Hei Zu with a smile.

Distance.

The face of the original controller changed, and he tried his best to stop it, but it was still a step too late, and the Black Ancestor was still out of trouble.

He was no match for Black Ancestor, so he fled immediately.

The Black Ancestor didn't go after and kill the Primordial Controller, after all, he didn't dare to really kill the Primordial Controller, otherwise even if the Primordial Ancestor couldn't get in, I'm afraid he would pay a huge price for all the Ten Realm-level Masters to besiege him.

Moreover, he didn't know if the Primordial Ancestor would be able to return to the Origin Realm Sea at a huge cost, so there was no need to take the risk.

Right now, his task is to cultivate and surpass the Ten Realms-level masters.

......

After the Primordial Controller returned to the Primordial Realm, he immediately spread the news that the Black Ancestor had been freed.

For a moment, the entire Origin Realm Sea was shocked by this news.

And Ye Tian also knew the news for the first time.

"Heizu is actually out of trouble!"

Ye Tian frowned.

This is not a good thing, with the style of the Black Ancestor, the entire Origin Realm Sea is afraid that it will be chaotic.

At the same time, the great beings outside the Origin Realm who had surpassed the Ten Realms level also knew the news that the Black Ancestor had been freed from the predicament, and if it was in the past, they didn't care about this little thing.

But now, they can't enter the Origin Realm Sea, and this is not a trivial matter.

this day.

The Ten Elements Ancestor, the Primordial Ancestor, the Realm Ancestor and others chatted together.

"Primordial Ancestor, you sealed the Black Ancestor at the beginning, but now that people are out of trouble, I'm afraid you're in trouble!"

"Hei Zu, does he dare to kill all of my veins? If he dares, I will kill him. "Primordial Ancestor Dao.

"You can't enter the Origin Realm Sea, how can you kill him?" said the Realm Ancestor with a smile.

Ten Elements Ancestor said: "At the beginning, you should have killed the Black Ancestor, and there would be no trouble today!"

The Primordial Ancestor sighed: "After all, the Black Ancestor is a disciple of the Blood Emperor, at the beginning, the Blood Emperor had a huge contribution to the Origin Realm Sea, and the Blood Emperor fell, and I am embarrassed to kill his only disciple!"

"There's nothing we can do at the moment, let those Ten Realm-level controllers of the Origin Realm Sea worry about it. Although Hei Zu is powerful, there are only a few Ten Realm-level controllers who can compete with him, so there is nothing to worry about. "Ten Elements Ancestral Dao.

"Well, that's all there is to it!"

Primitive Ancestor Dao.
